## RULE #1: ALL TABLES MUST BE SORTABLE

When creating ANY new table in StudioFlow, you MUST use the DataTable component from @/components/ui/data-table.

NEVER build tables with raw HTML <table> elements.
NEVER build tables without sortable columns.

Every table = DataTable with TanStack. No exceptions.
